evidence_quotes.quote: when I pay for game I should own the game on my device not in cloud where it might gets deleted at any time

paragraphs.text: when I pay for game I should own the game on my device not in cloud where it might gets deleted at any time I need the game to be ether exe file on my device or stay in my library because my money and my time that I spent to have fun isn't supposed to be wasted especially that I paid for the product it wasn't free and there is offline mode in the game so even if you need to close the server it's my right to play the offline mode especially that this happened to me in completely offline game and the only online thing in it is to see how fast other people finished the race
